transformation_type: aldehyde/ketone deoxygenation to methylene / carbonyl-to-alkane reduction
mechanism_type: strongly acidic zinc-mediated deoxygenation via organozinc/carbenoid or carbanion-like intermediates
key_reagents_clue: Zn(Hg)|conc. HCl|dry HCl|dry HBr|zinc amalgam|acidic deoxygenation
common_conditions: amalgamated zinc with concentrated aqueous or dry hydrogen halides under strongly acidic heating conditions
description_short: Strongly acidic zinc-mediated reduction of aldehydes and ketones to the corresponding alkanes or methylene derivatives.
